urdu transliteration text:
Kehti Thi Ye Maa Khoon Bhari Maiyat Say Lipat Kar
Haye Haye Ali Akbar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: While clutching his blood-soaked body, his mother would wail; O My Ali Akbar, O My Ali Akbar!

urdu transliteration text:
Arman Tha Pehnawoon Gi Poshak ShahaniAfsoos Ke Raas Aayi Na Tujh Ku Yeh JawaniKaisa Tha Muqaddar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I had a wish to dress you in a grand manner. But sadly your youth was snatched away from you. What a destiny, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Athara Baras Paal Kay Parwan CharhayaAur Gaisuwoon Wala Hai Mera Khoo(n) Main NahayaKurban Ho Maadar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: For eighteen years I nurtured and raised you yet my young lad, with handsome locks of hair, is bathed in blood. May your mother be sacrificed for you, O Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Itna To Zara Thehro Tumhai Dhulha Bana Loon
Bas Ek Jhalak Sehray Ki Sughra Ko Dhika Loon
Baichain Thi Khwahar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Please wait so that I can see you as a groom. Allow me to show Sughra a glimpse of you. Your sister is worried, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Maa Teri Judayi Mein Bhala Kaisay Jeeye Gi
Mar Jaayegi Sughra Jo Khabar Teri Sunay Gi
Ab Kya Karoon Dilber, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How will your mother survive without you. Sughra will die when she hears this news. What I should do my sweetheart, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Tehro Kay Mein Atharween Mannat To Badha Loon
Phir Lay Kay Balayein Tujhay Jeenay Ki Dua Doon
Sadqay Ho Ay Maadar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Wait till I fulfill my eighteenth promise. I shall take all of your trials and pray for your life. May your mom be sacrificed for you, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Pehlay To Ek Aawaz Pay Uth Jatay Thay Beta
Ab Etni Saada’oon Pay Bhi Pehloo Nahi Badla
Kya Ho Gaya Dilber, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You would wake up as soon as you would hear me. Now, despite calling you many times, you are not responding. What happened to you O My sweetheart, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Tum Hichkiyaan Lay Lay Kay Jo Dam Taur Rahay Ho
Moo Maa Say Hamaisha Kay Liye Mour Rahay Ho
Kyon Rootay Ho Dilber, Haye Haye Ali Akbar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: As you take your last breath, you are departing from your mother forever. Why do you cry O my sweetheart, Haye Haye Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Aaye Jo Hamein Lootnay Khaimay Mein Sitamgar
Maa Day Gi Sadaayein Ali Akbar, Ali Akbar
Chin Jaayay Gi Chaadar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When the enemies come to loot our tents. Your mother will call out saying O My Ali Akbar, O My Ali Akbar. My veils will be snatched away, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Koi Jawan Laash Nazar Aati Hai Mahshar
Ek Yaad Suway Karbobala Jaati Hai Mahshar
Dil Rota Hay Keh Kar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Whenever I see any young person’s dead body. My thoughts reach out to Karbala.  My heart cries for you,O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
kehti Thi Ye Maa Khoon Bhari Maiyat Say Lipat Kar
Haye Haye Ali Akbar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: While clutching his blood-soaked body, his mother would wail; O My Ali Akbar, O My Ali Akbar!
